caption: A man with glasses and long hair tied back performs in front of a neutral-colored slatted background. He wears a white long-sleeved shirt under a black vest adorned with red and white embroidery, paired with a red beaded necklace. He stands behind a black lectern that displays the white text "ORCA". A black microphone on a boom arm is positioned in front of his face. As he speaks or sings, he gestures with his hands and glances down toward the lectern. In the foreground, the backs of several people's heads are visible, including individuals with blonde and grey hair, indicating an audience. The scene remains consistent across the sequence, with only slight changes in the man's facial expression and hand positioning as he interacts with the microphone and lectern.
